name: Glazed Chicken Drumettes with Warm Asian Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup garlic and ginger stir fry sauce
6 cups prepared coleslaw mix (from 16 oz. package)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet or wok, cook sesame seeds over medium-high heat for 2 to 3 minutes, stirring occasionally, until light golden brown. Remove from the skillet; set aside.
2. In the same skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat until hot. Add chicken drumsticks; cook for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until golden brown.
3. Stir in broth and reduce heat to medium. Cover loosely and cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add garlic and ginger stir fry sauce and cook, stirring frequently without covering, for 6-8 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender and juices run clear, turning occasionally.
5. Arrange chicken on a serving platter in a spoke arrangement. Reserve 1/4 cup of sauce. Pour remaining sauce over the chicken. Cover to keep warm.
6. Add coleslaw mix and reserved sauce to the skillet; cook and stir for 2 to 3 minutes or until well coated and thoroughly heated.
7. Serve by spooning coleslaw mix in the center of each chicken piece. Sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds. Makes 4 servings.
